CustomField.description: Original committed pledge amount, preserved for history. Under JSI-82 Option B, when a pledge becomes Partially Posted the Opportunity Amount is overwritten with the collected total; this field retains the original commitment. Added for JSI-82. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The originally committed pledge amount (retained even if Amount is later reduced to the collected total).
CustomField.label: Original Pledge Amount
